Title: Coding Essentials Notes: Backgrounds, Color, and Hex Codes
Description:
Reference notes covering fundamental web development concepts, perfect for students, designers, and developers.

This set of notes highlights essential syntax and values used in CSS and web design:

  • backgrounds: Understanding how to set page and element backgrounds.
  • color: Basics of defining foreground and background colors.
  • Hex Codes (#1AID23, #FFF): Quick reference for common color palettes and hexadecimal color notation, vital for accurate design implementation.

Whether you are tackling a new coding project, preparing for an exam, or simply refreshing your design knowledge, these compact notes serve as a valuable, portable reference guide. The black background and clear, high-contrast white text ensure maximum readability and study focus.

Ideal for use as a desk reminder, a study aid, or a helpful visual cue when learning web technologies.
